name: @corkprotocol/mcp-monorepo
description: Cork Protocol Model Context Protocol server and canonical operation packages.

scripts.check:runtime: node --input-type=module -e "const major = Number.parseInt(process.versions.node.split('.')[0], 10); if (major !== 22) { console.error('Node.js 22.x is required; received ' + process.versions.node); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.clean: npm run clean:dist && rimraf coverage dist build .turbo
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @corkprotocol/operations && npm run build --workspace @corkprotocol/operations-node && npm run build --workspace @corkprotocol/gateway
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @corkprotocol/operations && npm run typecheck --workspace @corkprotocol/operations-node && npm run typecheck --workspace @corkprotocol/gateway && npm run typecheck --workspace @corkprotocol/conformance
scripts.mcp:live-read: npm run build --silent && npm run live-read --workspace @corkprotocol/gateway --
scripts.mcp:safe-coverage: npm run build --silent && npm run safe-demo --workspace @corkprotocol/gateway -- --coverage
scripts.mcp:safe-demo: npm run build --silent && npm run safe-demo --workspace @corkprotocol/gateway --
scripts.mcp:smoke: npm run build && npm run smoke --workspace @corkprotocol/gateway
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:boundaries
scripts.test:unit: npm test --workspace @corkprotocol/operations && npm test --workspace @corkprotocol/operations-node && npm test --workspace @corkprotocol/gateway && npm test --workspace @corkprotocol/conformance
scripts.ci: npm run check:runtime && npm run clean:dist && npm run format:check && npm run build && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test
